locked.title: AI Bookings
locked.oneLiner: Unlock AI Bookings with Pro and let customers schedule appointments directly through chat.

bullets.1: Real-time availability synced with your Cal.com calendar.
bullets.2: Bot collects name, email, phone, and notes — booked in under a minute.
bullets.3: Confirmation emails, reminders, and reschedule links sent automatically.

placeholder.title: Bookings
placeholder.subtitle: Bookings module landing here in M5.

locked.title: Lead Capture
locked.oneLiner: Capture every visitor's intent and turn conversations into qualified leads.

bullets.1: Automatically collect name, email, phone, and the question that brought them in.
bullets.2: Custom fields and routing rules so the right person gets the right lead.
bullets.3: Export leads to CSV or your CRM via webhook.

placeholder.title: Lead Capture
placeholder.subtitle: Lead capture module landing here in M6.

locked.title: Social Media
locked.oneLiner: Reach customers where they already are — connect every messaging channel in one inbox.

bullets.1: Facebook Messenger, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Telegram in one place.
bullets.2: AI bot answers and human handoff work across every channel.
bullets.3: Unified conversation history regardless of where the chat started.

create.adminEmailHelp: If provided, this user will be invited as the tenant admin.

tierDialog.title: Set tier (manual override)
tierDialog.descriptionAfter: . This is a manual override — it bypasses Stripe and writes a manual primary billing row. Use it for comps, sales-managed Enterprise, or refund-driven downgrades.
tierDialog.stripeWarning: if this tenant has an active Stripe subscription, this does not cancel it. Open the Stripe dashboard and cancel the subscription there to stop further charges.

rotateDialog.title: Rotate API Key
rotateDialog.description: This will invalidate the current API key immediately. Any integrations using it will break until updated with the new key.

deactivate.description: Are you sure you want to deactivate {{name}}? They will be removed from their Clerk organization and lose access.
